level.setting: The Obsidian Maw of the Ever-Burning Core

pickup.name: Frost-Infused Quartz
pickup.effect: Temporarily coats the environment in a freezing mist

encounters.trigger: A massive stone slab rises, sealing the entrance and revealing a path deeper into the vents.

encounters.hazard: Intermittent geysers of boiling sulfuric acid

pickup.name: Vial of Ancient Basalt Oil
pickup.effect: Provides fire resistance and weapon lubrication

encounters.trigger: The ground collapses, sliding the player into the Molten Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Expanding lava pools that reduce safe standing ground

pickup.name: Eye of the Geyser Lord
pickup.effect: Allows the wielder to focus subterranean pressure into a concentrated beam

encounters.trigger: The floor begins to vibrate violently as the ceiling shatters, exposing the Boss Arena.

boss.name: Ignis the World-Eater
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Eye of the Geyser Lord to puncture Ignis's heart while it is exposed during its cooling phase.

level.objective: Quell the volcanic eruption by defeating the primordial spirit Ignis at the core of the mountain.
level.reward: The 'World-Shaper' Title and the Permanent Perk 'Internal Equilibrium'.

pickup.name: Cryo-Flask
pickup.effect: Infuses next 3 attacks with frost damage

encounters.trigger: A massive volcanic tremor collapses the bridge, funneling the player into the Sulfur Vents.

pickup.name: Heart of Ash
pickup.effect: Grants temporary immunity to lava damage

encounters.trigger: The phoenix's death wail shatters a stone seal, revealing the path to the Obsidian Throne.

pickup.name: Essence of the Sun
pickup.effect: Restores full health and triples damage for 10 seconds

encounters.trigger: The knight's armor melts into the floor, opening the gateway to the Core of the World.

boss.name: Ignis the Primeval Wyrm
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Essence of the Sun into the Wyrm's open maw during its fire-breath phase.

level.objective: Traverse the unstable caldera and slay the Primeval Wyrm to prevent a world-ending eruption.

pickup.name: Vial of Blessed Water
pickup.effect: Removes fire debuffs

encounters.trigger: Opening the inner basalt gates triggers the encounter in the Magma Chamber.

pickup.name: Sabatons of Frost
pickup.effect: Allows walking on solidified lava

encounters.trigger: Cooling the core magma reveals the path to the Altar of Ruin.

pickup.name: Relic of Purity
pickup.effect: Shields against demonic corruption

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel shatters the final seal protecting the Volcanic Tyrant.

boss.name: Solurrax the Blight-Bringer
boss.victory_condition: Banish Solurrax into the heart of the volcano using the Relic of Purity.

level.objective: Cleanse the volcanic core of demonic corruption.

pickup.name: Frost-Infused Core
pickup.effect: Reduces incoming fire damage by 30%

encounters.trigger: Finding the Core opens the Gate of Smolder.

pickup.name: Essence of the Void
pickup.effect: Temporarily renders player invulnerable

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Golem collapses the floor into the Hollow Hive.

enemy.name: Obsidian Sentinel
enemy.weakness: Essence of the Void bypassing armor

pickup.name: Quenching Singularity
pickup.effect: Extinguishes surrounding magma for 10 seconds

encounters.trigger: The Singularity's activation summons the Lord of the Forge.

boss.name: Ignis the Soul-Burner
boss.victory_condition: Freeze the core and deliver a final Chain-Axe blow.

level.objective: Traverse the scorched desolate landscape to extinguish the Eternal Flame.

level.setting: The Obsidian Caverns of Mount Ignis

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Gel
pickup.effect: Reduces heat damage and coats projectiles in frost

encounters.trigger: Defeating the beetle unlocks the inner cavern door.

pickup.name: Kinetic Capacitor
pickup.effect: Stores energy to release a powerful shockwave

encounters.trigger: The golem's collapse creates a bridge across the lava river.

pickup.name: Conductive Wire Net
pickup.effect: Disables mechanical or magical shields

encounters.trigger: The wisp's residue activates the elevator to the volcanic core.

boss.name: Ignis Core Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Disable the Guardian's shield with the Net and deplete its health.

level.objective: Reach the heart of the volcano to stabilize the core.

level.setting: The Obsidian Rift of the Silent Magma

pickup.name: Frost Vial
pickup.effect: Grants brief immunity to heat damage

encounters.trigger: The Shade dissipates into a trail of smoke leading toward the sulfur vents.

pickup.name: Charged Lodestone
pickup.effect: Adds 50 percent electrical conductivity to targets

encounters.trigger: The Golem's collapse causes a tremor that opens the basalt gate to the inner sanctum.

pickup.name: Static Essence
pickup.effect: Overcharges elemental weapons for one massive burst

encounters.trigger: The Wyrmling's death scream shatters the final seal of the Lord's chamber.

boss.name: Ignis the Eternal Ember
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Static Essence within the boss's core while the Tempest Staff is fully charged

level.objective: Navigate the volcanic rift to extinguish the primordial flame before it consumes the sky.
level.reward: The Stormheart Amulet and the title of High Tempest.

pickup.name: Frosting Sprinkles
pickup.effect: Slows down fiery movements

encounters.trigger: A sticky trail of jam leads deeper into the cavern toward the Chocolate Crag.

pickup.name: Glazed Donut Shield
pickup.effect: Absorbs heat damage

encounters.trigger: The bat drops a golden cracker that opens the gate to the Caramel Crater.

pickup.name: Enchanted Ice Cream Scoop
pickup.effect: Deals massive frost damage to hot surfaces

encounters.trigger: A loud rumble shakes the ground as the Great Fondue Fountain erupts.

boss.name: Sir S'mores the Scorched
boss.victory_condition: Freeze Sir S'mores until he becomes a solid, delicious treat.

level.objective: Tame the legendary fire beasts and soothe the angry volcano spirit.
level.reward: The Title of Master Sundae Chef and a permanent speed boost.

level.setting: The Whispering Caldera, a dormant lava lake surrounded by crystalized obsidian and floating ash petals.

pickup.name: Chronos Sand
pickup.effect: Slows down fast-moving projectiles

encounters.trigger: Touching the ancient sundial at the exit reveals the path to the Cinder Grove.

pickup.name: Stasis Shard
pickup.effect: Freezes environmental traps for 5 seconds

encounters.trigger: Placing the Seraph's feather on the altar unlocks the Geyser Field.

pickup.name: Aeon Aegis
pickup.effect: Provides a temporary shield against heat damage

encounters.trigger: Aligning the three steam valves opens the portal to the Volcanic Core.

boss.name: Ignis, the Timeless Ember
boss.victory_condition: Activate the Aegis to reflect the supernova blast and seal the caldera.

level.objective: Reach the heart of the caldera to stabilize the volatile flow of time.
level.reward: The Eternal Hourglass and the title of Master Chronomancer.

pickup.name: Vial of Lunar Dew
pickup.effect: Heals 30 HP

encounters.trigger: The courtyard gates open into the Mirror Hall.

pickup.name: Starlight Infusion
pickup.effect: Adds light damage to weapon

encounters.trigger: The hall dissolves into a bridge made of pure light.

pickup.name: Radiant Prism
pickup.effect: Focuses celestial energy

encounters.trigger: The prism activates a portal to the High Sanctum.

boss.name: Aurelion the Fallen Arbiter
boss.victory_condition: Use the Radiant Prism to dispel the Arbiter's darkness and reach 0 HP.

level.objective: Purify the Silver Spire and restore the Eternal Light.
level.reward: The Wings of the Morning Star

pickup.name: Stardust Lens
pickup.effect: Allows the player to see hidden temporal distortions

encounters.trigger: A clockwork gate unlocks, leading to the Gravity Well

pickup.name: Aeon Spark
pickup.effect: Temporarily freezes enemy projectiles in mid-air

encounters.trigger: The gravitational field collapses, revealing a bridge to the Zenith

pickup.name: Solar Core
pickup.effect: Radiates intense celestial heat that purges shadows

encounters.trigger: The gargoyle's stone heart shatters, opening the portal to the Boss Sanctum

boss.name: The Timeless Singularity
boss.victory_condition: Ignite the Solar Core inside the Singularity's eye to restore the flow of time

level.objective: Traverse the celestial orrery to restart the heart of the universe.
level.reward: The Eternal Hourglass and the Title of Master Chronos

encounters.hazard: Gravity wells that slow movement speed

pickup.name: Star-Eater's Core
pickup.effect: Absorbs light to create a localized shroud

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel's collapse shatters the gate, revealing the Path of Penance.

encounters.hazard: Floating debris that explodes on contact

pickup.name: Aetheric Residue
pickup.effect: Coats weapons in a substance that pierces divine armor

encounters.trigger: The Wraith's scream resonates through the spire, summoning the Celestial Executioner.

pickup.name: Essence of the Fallen God
pickup.effect: Temporary invulnerability and doubled attack speed

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Executioner opens the rift to the Throne of the Arch-Cosmos.

boss.name: The Arch-Cosmos
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Essence of the Fallen God to shatter the Arch-Cosmos's heart.

level.objective: Ascend the Shattered Astral Spire and extinguish the light of the Arch-Cosmos.
level.reward: The Title of 'God-Slayer' and the Blade of Eternal Eclipse.

pickup.name: Moonlight Essence
pickup.effect: Allows the player to solidify clouds

encounters.trigger: A path of solid moonlight appears, leading to the Comet Orchard

pickup.name: Stardust Mirror
pickup.effect: Reflects projectile attacks

encounters.trigger: The nebula dissipates into a shimmering bridge to the Zenith Throne

pickup.name: Eternal Halo
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to darkness-based damage

encounters.trigger: The throne room doors swing open with a chime

boss.name: The Weeping Moon King
boss.victory_condition: Cast an illusion of the sun to cheer the King up

level.objective: Navigate the floating islands and restore joy to the Moon King.
level.reward: The Title of Master Dreamweaver and a pair of Star-Wings

level.setting: A collapsing nebula inside a fractured cosmic rift

pickup.name: Ionized Essence
pickup.effect: Increases lightning conductivity

encounters.trigger: The Cherub's death scream opens a wormhole to the Solar Forge.

pickup.name: Absolute Zero Shard
pickup.effect: Freezes celestial heat sources

encounters.trigger: The cooling core collapses, revealing the bridge to the Silent Star.

pickup.name: Stellar Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Infuses weapon with explosive supernova energy

encounters.trigger: The Devourer's dispersal stabilizes the gateway to the Eye of the Cosmos.

boss.name: Aeon, The Corrupted Singularity
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Fragment within the Singularity's event horizon

level.objective: Purify the corrupted heart of the galaxy before the rift consumes all existence.
level.reward: The Mantle of the High Stormcaller

level.setting: A crumbling nebula platform drifting in the void of the Shattered Constellation.

encounters.hazard: Floating debris pulses with gravity wells.

pickup.name: Solar Essence
pickup.effect: Increases arrow velocity and ignores gravity.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Mote stabilizes a bridge of light leading to the Star-Graveyard.

pickup.name: Quicksilver String
pickup.effect: Reduces draw time and adds a piercing effect.

encounters.trigger: The Wraith's dissipation reveals a hidden lift to the Core of Silence.

encounters.hazard: Vacuum pockets drain oxygen and health over time.

pickup.name: Stellar Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Infuses arrows with high-intensity thermal energy.

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel's explosion shatters the containment field of the Final Monolith.

boss.name: Aurelion the Fallen Architect
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Architect's chest plate using the Stellar Core Fragment to expose the heart.

level.objective: Infiltrate the desolate celestial ruins to prevent the collapse of the local star system.
level.reward: The 'Star-Stalker' title and a permanent upgrade to bow range.

pickup.name: Singularity Core
pickup.effect: Modifies weapon to fire localized black holes

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Singularity Core into the pulpit opens the gate to the Star-Eater’s Lair

enemy.name: Solar Husk
enemy.weakness: Gravity Wells generated by the Singularity Core

pickup.name: Void-Glass Prism
pickup.effect: Refracts astral energy into a focused beam

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Husk causes the Cathedral floor to collapse into the Astral Womb

enemy.name: Comet Stalker
enemy.weakness: Prismatic refraction from the Void-Glass Prism

pickup.name: Essence of a Dead Star
pickup.effect: Empowers the Rail-Cannon with supernova-level heat

encounters.trigger: Absorbing the Essence summons the Arch-Seraph from the deep void

boss.name: Arch-Seraph of the Infinite Silence
boss.weakness: Supernova heat from the Essence of a Dead Star
boss.victory_condition: Overload the Seraph's core with three direct hits while its wings are unfurled

level.objective: Prevent the Arch-Seraph from extinguishing the cosmic flame of the sector
level.reward: Architect of the Heavens Title and the Eternal Star Forge Blueprint

level.setting: An unstable Dyson Swarm fragment orbiting a collapsing white dwarf.

pickup.name: Super-Conductive Coil
pickup.effect: Enhances plasma conductivity for electrical overloads

encounters.trigger: A distress signal from the Reactor Core unlocks the heavy blast doors.

pickup.name: Stellar Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Briefly lowers ambient temperature to absolute zero

encounters.trigger: The elemental's death causes a thermal surge, opening the path to the Oxygen Garden.

pickup.name: Frequency Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Synchronizes weapon vibrations to celestial resonance

encounters.trigger: The vine collapses into the ventilation shaft leading to the Command Throne.

boss.name: The Star-Eater Construct
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Construct's resonant core using tuned weapon pulses.

level.objective: Stabilize the Dyson fragment to prevent a supernova chain reaction.
level.reward: A Permanent Blueprint for the Celestial Overload Module.
